method_summary: Evaluation of machine learning agents on machine learning engineering tasks using Kaggle competitions as benchmarks, with human baselines established from Kaggle leaderboards and evaluation of frontier language models using open-source agent scaffolds.
key_innovation: MLE-bench benchmark for evaluating machine learning agents on real-world ML engineering skills using Kaggle competitions
best_result: OpenAI's o1-preview with AIDE scaffolding achieves at least the level of a Kaggle bronze medal in 16.9% of competitions
title: MLE-bench: Evaluating Machine Learning Agents on Machine Learning Engineering
